events.text: Here we go on a clean machine. Paste the one-line install command into your terminal and let it run. The script checks your platform, downloads the latest stable CLI binary, and drops it into your home directory. No sudo, no system-wide install.
events.afterText: Installed. The rdc binary is on your path.

events.text: Let's confirm it landed. The version flag prints exactly what just got installed, so you know the CLI is on your path and ready to use.
Now run the built-in doctor check. It inspects your environment end to end (the binary, your config, and connectivity) so you catch any setup gaps before you start working.
events.afterText: All checks green. You're ready to add your first server.
